title: Fortune Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Fortune Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Fortune Hotels in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fortune Hotels:
Fortune Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortune Hotels!
